---
name: Documentation Change
about: Suggest improvements or report issues with documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## What documentation needs to change?

Describe which section, page, or file needs updating.

## Current State

What does the documentation currently say (or what is missing)?

## Suggested Change

Describe the improvement or correction needed.

## Why This Change?

- [ ] Incorrect or outdated information
- [ ] Missing documentation for an existing feature
- [ ] Unclear or confusing explanation
- [ ] New feature needs documentation
- [ ] Typo or formatting issue

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, or references that support the change.
